name: Hibiscus Lemonade
prompt: Sun-drenched garden party scene: tall glasses of vivid pink hibiscus lemonade with floating magenta flower petals, condensation beads, fresh lemon slices, lush green garden bokeh. Editorial beverage photography, romantic summer elegance, rich saturated pinks and greens, golden hour backlight.

name: Raspberry Mint Lemonade
prompt: Outdoor brunch table under dappled shade: sparkling lemonade swirling with bright red raspberries and vivid spearmint sprigs, crushed ice catching sunlight. Fresh, social, invigorating summer mood, crisp macro details on fruit and herbs.

name: Cherry Limeade
prompt: Nostalgic picnic scene: mason jars of ruby-red cherry limeade with whole cherries and lime wedges on red-checkered cloth, golden afternoon sun. Playful Americana energy, vivid cherry red and zesty lime green, cinematic warmth.

name: Berry Melon
prompt: Peak summer farmers market abundance: overflowing baskets of mixed berries beside juicy cantaloupe and honeydew melon slices, sunbeams through striped market awning. Juicy, vibrant, abundant harvest mood, hyper-real fruit textures.

name: Cinnamon Mint
prompt: Cozy winter cabin morning: steaming mug surrounded by cinnamon sticks, ground cinnamon dust, and bright fresh mint leaves on rustic wood, soft snow visible through window. Warm spice meets cool herbal clarity, amber and green contrast.

name: Wintergreen Spice
prompt: Fireside winter evening: crackling fireplace glow, sprigs of wintergreen leaves with subtle holiday spices (star anise, clove) on stone hearth, snow falling outside window. Cool mint freshness wrapped in warm spice atmosphere.

name: Honey-Ginger
prompt: Calming evening kitchen still life: golden honey dripping from wooden dipper onto fresh ginger root slices, soft candlelight, warm amber tones, wellness ritual mood. Luxurious, soothing, intimate macro food photography.

name: Pomegranate Ginger
prompt: Elegant holiday table: crystal glasses garnished with glistening pomegranate arils and thin ginger slices, twinkling fairy lights bokeh, deep ruby red and warm gold palette. Festive premium entertaining, jewel-toned richness.

name: Watermelon Mojito
prompt: Poolside summer celebration: chunky fresh watermelon cubes, muddled mint leaves, lime wheels, icy aqua splash, bright turquoise pool reflections. Energetic, juicy, refreshing party vibe, saturated summer colors.

name: Pink Lemonade
prompt: Carefree carnival summer memory: frosty pink lemonade in classic glass with lemon twist, cotton-candy pink sky gradient, nostalgic fairground lights bokeh. Sweet, bright, carefree nostalgia without clutter.

name: Strawberry Basil
prompt: Farmers market sophistication: ripe strawberries halved beside glossy fresh basil leaves on marble surface, dewy morning light. Modern herbal-fruit pairing, beauty-counter fresh aesthetic, refined and interesting.

name: Peach Tea
prompt: Lazy porch afternoon: glass of iced peach tea with sun-warmed peach slices floating, wicker chair blur, soft golden haze. Tea-house calm, gentle peach amber and soft green tea tones, leisurely refreshment.

name: Cucumber Melon
prompt: Luxury spa retreat: cucumber water with honeydew melon balls, eucalyptus blur, cool blue-white steam, zen minimal composition. Serene wellness, crisp watery greens and pale melon, rejuvenating calm.

name: Peppermint Mocha
prompt: Holiday coffeehouse indulgence: peppermint mocha with whipped cream, crushed candy cane dust, dark chocolate curl, warm café lights. Festive comfort, rich chocolate brown and cool mint white, cozy December mood.

name: Ginger + Lime Mule
prompt: Copper Moscow mule mug with crushed ice, fiery ginger root, bright lime wedges, effervescent ginger beer splash. Cocktail sophistication, metallic copper gleam, spicy ginger heat and electric lime green.

name: Spiced Apple Cider
prompt: Autumn orchard walk: steaming spiced apple cider in enamel mug, crisp apples on burlap, cinnamon sticks, fallen leaves, misty golden orchard background. Orchard-crisp nostalgia, warm amber spice, October comfort.

name: Cranberry Lime
prompt: Holiday gathering sparkle: tart cranberries bursting with juice, lime zest spirals, fizzy clear ice, festive table bokeh. Bright celebration energy, cranberry crimson and lime chartreuse, Thanksgiving-to-New-Year fresh.

name: Pumpkin Spice
prompt: October cozy comfort: pumpkin spice blend with cinnamon sticks, nutmeg, clove, small pumpkin, knitted sweater texture blur. Iconic fall LE mood, warm orange and brown spice palette, indulgent seasonal nostalgia.

name: Strawberry-Pineapple
prompt: Tropical vacation escape: sun-warmed strawberries and golden pineapple chunks on beach towel, turquoise ocean blur, golden hour. Vacation energy, vibrant red and tropical yellow, carefree getaway mood.

name: Orange Creamsicle
prompt: Childhood summer nostalgia elevated: orange creamsicle popsicle melting into creamy vanilla swirl, bright orange and ivory layers, soft sunset glow. Playful nostalgia with adult polish, creamy citrus dream.

name: Blueberry-Lemon
prompt: Morning spa refresh ritual: deep blueberries submerged in sparkling lemon water, morning sun rays, white linen, dew drops. Rejuvenating AM energy, indigo berry and sunny lemon contrast, clean clarity.

name: Coconut-Lime
prompt: Two separate real ingredients side by side on white marble: one cracked brown coconut half with white flesh, and two halved bright green limes with wedges. Not a hybrid fruit, not a beach scene, no ocean or palm trees. Clean studio food photography.

name: Mango-Berry
prompt: Close-up hero still life: golden ripe mango slices fanned beside fresh strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries on a rustic wooden cutting board. No market background, no people — only mango and mixed berries. Juicy macro textures, morning sunlight, vibrant tropical fruit photography.

name: Dragonfruit-Rose
prompt: Premium beauty-counter luxury: vivid magenta dragonfruit cross-section with delicate pink rose petals on glossy surface, soft studio lighting. Exotic refinement, skincare-adjacent elegance, photogenic luxury oral-care mood.

name: Vanilla-Hazelnut
prompt: Coffeehouse morning comfort: toasted hazelnuts, vanilla bean pod split open, warm latte steam, rustic ceramic cup. Cozy AM indulgence, toasted brown and creamy vanilla ivory, nutty warmth.

name: Toasted Marshmallow
prompt: Campfire community nostalgia: marshmallows toasted golden-brown over campfire embers, wooden sticks, starry night blur. Warm companionship, caramelized marshmallow texture, cozy holiday LE mood.

name: Carrot Cake
prompt: Freshly baked autumn bakery: slice of spiced carrot cake with cream cheese frosting, cinnamon dust, shredded carrot garnish, warm bakery window light. Baked comfort nostalgia, spice and vanilla warmth.

name: Blackberry-Lavender
prompt: Evening spa tranquility: dark plump blackberries with sprigs of lavender in twilight blue hour, soft candle glow. PM calm sophistication, deep purple berry and soft lavender haze, serene relaxation.

name: Pomegranate-Pear
prompt: Winter holiday entertaining: pomegranate seeds scattered beside crisp pear slices on silver tray, champagne sparkle bokeh. Festive premium sparkle, ruby pomegranate and pale pear elegance.

name: Spearmint Garden
prompt: Dewy herb garden close-up: lush spearmint plant sprigs with serrated bright-green leaves glistening with water droplets, terracotta pots and soft garden bokeh. No ice cubes — only living spearmint in a garden. Fresh green botanical photography, morning sunlight.

name: Icy Peak Refresh
prompt: Extreme cooling hero shot: glass of crushed ice and peppermint leaves with cold vapor rising, frosty blue-white atmosphere like an alpine peak. Icy blue tones, dramatic cold mist, peppermint garnish on ice — peak refresh intensity.

name: Crystal Whitening Mint
prompt: Whitening clarity still life: clear diamond-like ice crystals and crushed ice piled with bright peppermint leaves sparkling under studio light. Brilliant white and icy blue, dazzling clean brilliance, no colored liquids.

name: Green Tea Fresh
prompt: Green tea ingredient hero: loose steamed sencha green tea leaves in a small ceramic bowl beside fresh spearmint sprigs on bamboo mat. Visible green tea leaves are the star — no kiwi, no random herbs, no fruit. Soft matcha-green palette, wellness tea photography.

name: Overnight Calm Mint
prompt: Bedtime calm still life: glass of water with white chamomile flowers, purple lavender sprigs, and soft mint leaves on a wooden nightstand beside a moonlit window. Evening serenity, muted purples and greens — chamomile, lavender, and mint only.

name: Warm Ginger Mint
prompt: Warm spice still life: fresh ginger root slices and whole ginger beside peppermint leaves on warm copper tray with gentle steam. No citrus, no lemon — only ginger and peppermint. Amber warmth meets cool green mint.

name: Healthy Gums Herbal
prompt: Therapeutic herbal still life: long eucalyptus leaves, tea tree sprigs with tiny white flowers, and fresh peppermint on a clean white surface. Clinical daylight, trustworthy green botanicals — eucalyptus, tea tree, and mint only. No vanilla, no cream, no lavender.

name: Vanilla Mint Silk
prompt: Silky comfort still life: split vanilla bean with black seeds beside peppermint leaves swirled in creamy white silk-smooth liquid on ivory marble. Luxurious creamy texture, soft ivory and mint green — vanilla and peppermint only. No chamomile, no bed scene.

name: Electric Blue Chill
prompt: Electric blue beverage hero: tall glass filled with vivid cyan-blue translucent liquid, ice cubes, and fresh mint garnish. The drink must be clearly BLUE not green. Blue LED underglow, cool modern product photography, hyper-chill aesthetic.

name: Cloud Matcha Mint
prompt: Matcha cloud drink hero: tall glass with thick fluffy bright-green matcha foam cloud on top, airy spearmint leaves as garnish, pale green matcha liquid below. The matcha must be visibly green. Soft café daylight, clean-girl aesthetic, photogenic wellness drink.

name: Y2K Bubblegum Mint
prompt: Y2K bubblegum still life: glossy hot-pink bubblegum pieces and pink bubble spheres beside crisp peppermint leaves on chrome reflective surface. Early-2000s pop aesthetic, hot pink and mint green — bubblegum and peppermint only. No space nebula.

name: Astro Peppermint
prompt: Cosmic peppermint scene: fresh peppermint leaves floating against a deep starfield with purple nebula and icy comet trails. Dark indigo space background with luminous stars — peppermint in outer space. Night-owl gamer energy, astro mint intensity.

name: Sparkling Vanilla Fizz
prompt: Sparkling vanilla soda hero: cream-colored vanilla sparkling drink in a classic soda glass with rising champagne bubbles, vanilla bean garnish, and a mint leaf on top. Retro malt-shop chrome counter, golden cream tones with effervescent fizz — vanilla soda sparkle, not pink candy.
